_methodology.framework: Rogers Diffusion of Innovations + RMI S-curve inflection research

milestones.5%: S-curve inflection point — adoption accelerates (RMI Bond & Butler-Sloss 2022)
milestones.16%: Early majority — technology crosses the 'chasm' (Rogers 1962, Moore 1991)
milestones.50%: Majority — dominant technology in the market

_methodology.rule: Each technology is tracked to its NEXT milestone. Pre-5% techs target 5%; post-5% target 16%; post-16% target 50%.

aviation_saf.name: Sustainable Aviation Fuel
aviation_saf.methodology_note: SAF as percentage of total jet fuel consumption globally. Pre-inflection: 0.3% is 94% below the 5% takeoff threshold.

shipping_alt_fuels.name: Alternative Shipping Fuels
shipping_alt_fuels.methodology_note: Alternative fuels (methanol, ammonia) as share of total shipping fuel by energy content. Pre-inflection: 0.1% is far from the 5% takeoff threshold.

green_hydrogen.name: Green Hydrogen
green_hydrogen.methodology_note: Green/low-carbon H2 as share of total hydrogen production. Approaching the 5% inflection point. Cost: ~$4-6/kg vs grey $1-2/kg.

green_steel.name: Green Steel (Electric Arc Furnace)
green_steel.methodology_note: EAF share of global crude steel production. Past inflection (5%) and early majority (16%); next milestone is majority production at 50%.

electric_trucks.name: Electric Trucks
electric_trucks.methodology_note: Electric truck sales as share of total new truck sales globally. Pre-inflection; following passenger EV cost declines with ~3-5 year lag.

heat_pumps_global.name: Heat Pumps (Global Heating Share)
heat_pumps_global.methodology_note: Heat pumps as share of global heating equipment sales. Past the 5% inflection; next milestone is 16% early majority (crossing the chasm). Nordics already at 90%+.

induction_cooking.name: Induction Cooking
induction_cooking.methodology_note: Induction hobs as share of global cooking appliance sales. At the 5% inflection point; next milestone is 16% early majority. Already dominant in parts of Asia.
